column1: # balanceStrungCm: measured from butt end — converted to HL/Even/HH by build script

column3: advanced

column1: # stiffnessRA: Babolat RA stiffness rating (optional — leave blank if unknown)

column3: tecnifibre-x-one-biphase,The ultimate precision tool. Dense low-powered frame favoured by players who want pinpoint control and feedback. Demands clean ball-striking but rewards with surgical shot-making.

tecnifibre-black-code,One of the best all-round frames on tour. Beautiful balance of control feel and spin potential. Popular with advanced club players who want a competitive edge without going to extremes.

tecnifibre-black-code,Dense pattern version of the Blade 98. The 18x20 string bed provides maximum control for advanced players with complete confidence in their swing. The most precise Wilson Blade option.

luxilon-alu-power,One of the most control-oriented frames on the market. Dense 18x20 pattern and heavy static weight suit advanced players who have complete confidence in their swing. Unforgiving but incredibly rewarding.

luxilon-alu-power,A hidden gem. Built around RS technology for enhanced flex and feel. A precision weapon for advanced players who want a dead ball-pocketing sensation and excellent feedback on every shot.

tecnifibre-x-one-biphase,Advanced player's frame with excellent feel and control. The Isoflex grommet system reduces vibration without adding stiffness. A comfortable yet precise tool for experienced players.
babolat-vs-team,Dense 18x20 pattern gives ultimate control and precision. Every shot lands exactly where you aim. For players who trust their swing speed to generate their own power.
solinco-hyper-g,More control-oriented sibling of the Pure Aero. Smaller 98 square inch head suits advanced players who want the Pure Aero's spin potential with better precision and feel.
solinco-hyper-g,Rafa's weapon of choice. Aerodynamic frame and open 16x19 pattern make this a spin-generating machine. Great for baseline grinders who love heavy kicking topspin.
prince-synthetic-gut,Best-selling racquet in the world for good reason. Powerful forgiving frame that suits a wide range of players. If you just want to play and win this is where most people start.
wilson-nxt,Precision-focused member of the Pure family. Combines control-oriented DNA with enough power for intermediate players. A great choice for those who prioritise shot placement over raw pace.
wilson-nxt,Novak-inspired. Light fast and versatile — a true all-court weapon. Suits players who want a bit of everything without sacrificing feel or manoeuvrability.
wilson-nxt,Agassi's old frame reborn. A balanced all-court racquet that rewards smart tennis over brute power. Great for players who mix their game and like a classic feel.
wilson-nxt,Alexander Zverev's former frame. Unique 16x20 string pattern offers an unusual blend of spin and control. Very versatile all-court racquet that suits a wide range of playing styles.
babolat-xcel,Larger lighter version of the Speed MP. The 105 square inch head gives more forgiveness for intermediate players while retaining the Speed's comfortable flexible feel.

yonex-poly-tour-pro,Famously arm-friendly thanks to its isometric head shape. Go-to for players wanting solid performance without battering their elbow. Comfortable powerful and forgiving on every shot.

babolat-rpm-blast,Yonex's spin-focused frame. The VCore 98 channels spin potential through its aerodynamic frame design and open 16x19 pattern. Very popular with competitive club and intermediate players.

tecnifibre-x-one-biphase,Larger version of the EZONE 98. The 100 square inch isometric head offers excellent comfort and forgiveness. Slightly more power than the 98 while retaining Yonex's signature arm-friendly feel.
wilson-nxt,Power-focused intermediate frame with head-heavy balance for extra pace. Open 16x19 pattern aids spin generation. Great for players who want power and forgiveness from their racquet.

babolat-rpm-power,Famously flexible and arm-friendly. Wilson's FreeFlex technology makes this one of the most comfortable powerful frames on the market. Excellent for players with arm concerns who still want performance.

solinco-tour-bite,The extreme spin frame. Wilson's 16x15 spin-focused pattern works with almost any string to maximise topspin output. Ideal for players who want the racquet to do the heavy lifting on spin.

prince-premier-control,Beautifully crafted frame with a unique 16x18 pattern adding extra pop and spin. Lighter than it feels and hugely satisfying for all-round baseliners who want something a little different.
solinco-hyper-g,Dunlop's spin-focused player's racquet. Aerodynamic frame design maximises head speed for heavy topspin. Popular at intermediate level for players who love grinding from the baseline.

babolat-xcel,Tecnifibre's innovative flexible frame designed to reduce arm shock while maintaining solid performance. Great for players who want to stay comfortable without sacrificing too much control or feel.

wilson-revolve,Very flexible and comfortable frame. Low stiffness makes this one of the most arm-friendly player's racquets available. Excellent for intermediate players with arm sensitivity who want good all-round performance.

wilson-synthetic-gut-power,Lighter version of the Pure Drive. Same powerful forgiving character at a more manageable weight. Perfect for beginners and intermediate players stepping up from entry-level racquets.

wilson-sensation,Entry-level frame bearing Roger Federer's name. Light and head-heavy for easy power generation. Perfect for complete beginners who want a comfortable forgiving racquet to learn the game with.

babolat-sg-spiraltek,Oversized beginner frame. Extra-large 110 square inch head makes it very forgiving and easy to use. Ideal for complete beginners or recreational players who just want to rally and enjoy the game.

wilson-sensation,One of the most popular beginner racquets ever made. The 115 square inch head and very light weight make it extremely forgiving. A classic recommendation for true beginners and senior players.

wilson-sensation,Yonex's arm-friendly beginner frame. The isometric head and flexible construction make this one of the most comfortable beginner racquets available. Perfect for arm-sensitive players starting out.
